name: @clearline/data-access-onboarding
description: Business-onboarding (KYB) data-access layer for clearline-web: React Query hooks over /api/onboarding/*, plus the client-side document image quality-check pipeline (US-CW-004, US-CW-005). No UI, no business rules — those live in libs/ui and libs/domain/onboarding respectively.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-002 (US-CW-004 Business Onboarding Flow, US-CW-005 Identity Document Verification & Compliance Screening).
